ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contestants" (
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contestant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contestant or group */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score received by the contestant */,
  "jury_score" REAL /* Score given by the jury */,
  "televoting_score" REAL /* Score received from televoting */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country represented by the contestant */,
  "song_name" TEXT /* Name of the song performed by the contestant */,
  "song_length" TEXT /* Length of the song */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contestant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant receiving the score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country giving the score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the contest */,
  "jury_score" REAL /* Score given by the jury */,
  "televoting_score" REAL /* Score given by televoting */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the contestant in the contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jury_members" (
  "jury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jury member */,
  "jury_name" TEXT /* Name of the jury member */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country represented by the jury member */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the jury member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jury_members_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote entry */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant receiving the vote */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country giving the vote */,
  "televoting_score" REAL /* Televoting score given by the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the contest */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method used for voting (e.g., SMS, online, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the contest */,
  "edition_number" INTEGER /* Edition number of the contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jury_scores" (
  "jury_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jury score entry */,
  "jury_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jury member giving the score */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant receiving the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given by the jury member */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the contest */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for judging (e.g., vocals, performance, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jury_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jury_scores_jury_id FOREIGN KEY ("jury_id") REFERENCES jury_members ("jury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jury_scores_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "televoting_scores" (
  "televote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each televote entry */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant receiving the vote */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country giving the vote */,
  "score" REAL /* Televoting score given by the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the contest */,
  "voting_region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., North, South, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("televote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_televoting_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_televoting_scores_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overall_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overall result entry */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score received by the contestant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the contest */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the contestant in the contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overall_results_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, judge, viewer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_details" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the contest */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the contest */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the contest was held */,
  "host_country" INTEGER /* ID of the host country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_details_host_country FOREIGN KEY ("host_country") REFERENCES host_countries ("host_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_details_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES contest_years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "host_countries" (
  "host_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the host country */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country hosting the contest */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the contest */,
  "host_city" TEXT /* City where the contest was held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_host_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the theme */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the contest */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_themes_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES contest_years ("year")
)
